name: file_system
description: 提供本地文件系统能力：读写文件、列举目录、检查路径、浏览目录树
prompt: You have access to file system tools that let you read files, write files, list directories, check if a path exists, and explore directory trees. When the user asks about file contents or directory structure, use these tools proactively. Always prefer absolute paths. For large directories, use list_directory before get_directory_tree to avoid excessive output.
